LanguageData.UB_SNS_VRsocialite.title: VR socialite
LanguageData.UB_SNS_VRsocialite.description: Due to toxic fallout on their homeworld, [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to live underground in a nuclear shelter with [PAWN_possessive] family for years, the only form of outside communication being the VR headset they managed to pull in with them. [PAWN_nameDef] would spend hours at a time using the headset to escape the reality of being stuck in a bomb shelter, talking and playing around with others online, but due to [PAWN_possessive] diet of MREs and dried foods, never learned any survival skills.
